context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements holdout-group A/B testing with deterministic session-based variant assignment, tracks control group exit events, uses unique one-time promo codes, enforces single-variable testing, and produces a correct holdout comparison SQL query.

checklist.name: Control variant is null
checklist.description: The variants map/object has a 'control' key whose value is null (no popup for the holdout group)

checklist.name: Deterministic session assignment
checklist.description: Variant assignment uses the last 2 characters of a session ID parsed as hex: parseInt(sessionId.slice(-2), 16) % numVariants

checklist.name: Control group event tracking
checklist.description: Even for the control (no popup) group, exit intent is tracked — an event is recorded with shown: false or equivalent

checklist.name: Unique one-time promo codes
checklist.description: Promo codes are generated individually per email submission (not a shared static code like WELCOME10)

checklist.name: Promo code source field
checklist.description: Generated promo codes include a source field using exit_popup_${popupId} pattern

checklist.name: Promo code expiry
checklist.description: Generated promo codes have an expiry (expiresInDays or equivalent) set to 7 days

checklist.name: Single variable enforcement
checklist.description: Experiment variants only differ on offer type — the experiment-design.md or code comments explain that only one variable (offer type) is rotated at a time

checklist.name: SQL groups by variant
checklist.description: The analytics SQL query groups results by variant and computes conversion rate per variant

checklist.name: SQL holdout comparison
checklist.description: The SQL query queries from exit_intent_events (or equivalent table) and includes sessions from the control group

checklist.name: Email capture stores source
checklist.description: The email capture handler stores source='exit_popup' (or similar) alongside the subscriber record

checklist.name: Cleanup after popup shown
checklist.description: The exit intent cleanup function is called after the popup is displayed (to prevent re-triggering)
